function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md provides an explicit complete list of five files to OCR. One listed file path does not exist (read error) and exact-name find returned no matches, so completing exactly the requested set is impossible without guessing/substitution. Per workflow/rules, partial processing is not acceptable when required data is missing.
